# Affordable Treefellers LLC — Full Information

## Company Overview
Affordable Treefellers LLC is a licensed and insured tree service company based in Shawnee, Kansas, owned and operated by Eric Frauenknecht. Founded in 2013, the company provides professional tree removal, trimming, stump grinding, storm damage cleanup, and land clearing for residential and commercial properties within a 30-40 mile radius of Shawnee, KS on the Kansas side of the Kansas City metropolitan area.

## Contact Information
- Company: Affordable Treefellers LLC
- Owner: Eric Frauenknecht
- Phone: (816) 509-3232
- Email: bigvermont@hotmail.com
- Website: https://affordabletreefellers.com
- Location: Shawnee, KS
- Hours: Monday-Saturday 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Emergency: 24/7 emergency tree service available
- USDOT Number: 3421117
- Licensed and insured with full liability coverage

## Service Area
Affordable Treefellers serves the Kansas side of the Kansas City metro within a 30-40 mile radius of Shawnee, KS. Coverage includes:
- Johnson County: Shawnee, Overland Park, Olathe, Lenexa, Merriam, Mission, Prairie Village, Leawood, Gardner, Spring Hill, De Soto, Edgerton
- Wyandotte County: Kansas City KS, Bonner Springs, Edwardsville
- Leavenworth County: Basehor, Tonganoxie, Leavenworth
- Douglas County: Lawrence area (edge of range), Eudora

## Services

### Tree Removal
Safe, complete removal of dead, hazardous, storm-damaged, or unwanted trees. Equipped with bucket truck (60+ foot reach), Stihl MS 461 and MS 661 chainsaws, and professional rigging systems for controlled sectional removal near structures. Typical cost: $300-$2,500+ depending on tree size, condition, and proximity to structures. Stump grinding available as add-on.

### Tree Trimming & Pruning
Crown thinning, deadwood removal, crown raising, clearance trimming (structures, power lines, fences), shaping, and vista pruning. Bucket truck access for tall canopies. Best timing for Kansas hardwoods: dormancy period (late November through early March). Typical cost: $150-$1,200+.

### Stump Grinding & Removal
Stumps ground 6-12 inches below grade level using commercial stump grinder. Backfill with wood grindings included; topsoil available on request. Handles stumps of any diameter. Typical cost: $100-$500+ per stump with multi-stump discounts available. Most stumps take 30-90 minutes.

### Storm Damage Cleanup & Emergency Services
24/7 emergency response for fallen trees on homes, vehicles, fences, roads, and power lines. Typical response time under 2 hours within service area. Insurance claim documentation provided. Coordinates with utility companies when trees are entangled in power lines.

### Commercial & Residential Tree Care
Ongoing maintenance for homeowners, landlords, property managers, HOAs, apartment communities, office parks, and municipal properties. Annual and semi-annual maintenance plans available. Certificates of insurance provided to commercial clients before work begins.

### Lot & Land Clearing
Complete site clearing for new construction, fence installation, overgrown property cleanup, and commercial development. Includes tree felling, brush clearing, on-site chipping (Vermeer BC1000), and stump grinding. Typical cost: $1,500-$10,000+ depending on acreage and density.

## Equipment
- Bucket truck with 60+ foot reach
- Vermeer BC1000 wood chipper
- Stihl MS 461 and MS 661 professional chainsaws
- Commercial stump grinder
- Professional rigging systems for sectional removal
- All equipment USDOT registered (#3421117) for highway transport

## About the Owner
Eric Frauenknecht has spent most of his career in the service industry. He founded Affordable Treefellers in 2013 on the principle that professional tree care shouldn't cost a fortune. Eric is present on every major job and provides all estimates in person.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does tree removal cost in Shawnee, KS?
A: Tree removal typically costs $300-$2,500+ depending on tree size, condition, and proximity to structures or power lines. Small ornamental trees run $300-$600, medium trees $600-$1,500, and large hardwoods near structures $1,500-$2,500+.

Q: When is the best time to trim trees in Kansas?
A: Most Kansas hardwoods should be pruned during dormancy from late November through early March. Dead or hazardous branches should be removed immediately regardless of season.

Q: How much does stump grinding cost?
A: $100-$500+ per stump depending on diameter. Small stumps under 12 inches start at $100-$150. Multi-stump discounts are available.

Q: How fast can you respond to storm damage emergencies?
A: We offer 24/7 emergency response and typically reach properties within our 30-mile service area in under 2 hours.

Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes. Affordable Treefellers LLC is fully licensed, insured, and registered with the U.S. Department of Transportation (USDOT #3421117). We carry full liability insurance coverage.

Q: Do I need a permit to remove a tree in Shawnee?
A: Shawnee, KS does not currently require permits for removing trees on private residential property. Trees in city right-of-way or under HOA covenants may have restrictions.

Q: Does insurance cover storm damage tree removal?
A: In most cases, yes, if the tree damages an insured structure (home, garage, vehicle). Trees that fall in open yard areas may not be covered. We provide documentation for insurance claims.

Q: Do you offer maintenance plans?
A: Yes. Annual and semi-annual plans are available for residential and commercial properties, including scheduled trimming, deadwood removal, and hazard assessments.
